name: Auto MOT Centre Ltd
description: DVSA-authorised independent garage in Manor Park, London, offering MOT testing, full and interim car servicing, diagnostics, oil changes, and general repairs for all makes and models.

capabilities.name: Book an MOT Test
capabilities.description: Schedule a Class 4 MOT test online. Tests from £40, completed in approximately 45 minutes.

capabilities.name: Book a Car Service
capabilities.description: Schedule a Full Service, Interim Service, oil change, or other maintenance.

capabilities.name: Check MOT Status
capabilities.description: Look up the current MOT status and expiry date for any UK-registered vehicle.

capabilities.name: Contact the Garage
capabilities.description: Send a message or request a callback from the team.
